belier.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio moves through your eighth house, and the waxing gibbous light at 69 percent builds steadily toward revelation rather than release. Today the Sun leaves Cancer behind and enters Leo, lighting up your fifth house of romance, creativity, and joyful risk, while Mercury turns direct at last, unsticking whatever conversations or decisions have felt stalled these past weeks. This is a day for trusting the momentum that is finally moving in your favor.
belier.love: A truth about intimacy or shared vulnerability surfaces with more force than usual under this Scorpio Moon, and with Mercury now direct, a conversation you have been avoiding can finally happen without the old confusion. The Sun's arrival in your fifth house adds warmth and a genuine appetite for pleasure.
belier.work: Financial or deeply shared matters come into sharper focus, and the fog that surrounded a decision during Mercury's retrograde lifts enough for you to move forward with confidence. A delayed message or contract may finally land.
belier.energy: Your fire meets the Scorpio Moon's intensity and produces something concentrated rather than scattered, a determined undertow beneath your usual directness. Channel it into one meaningful task rather than several small ones.
belier.intuition: The eighth house Moon sharpens your sense of what is hidden beneath a partner's or collaborator's words. Trust the instinct that tells you something is finally ready to be named honestly.
belier.mantra: I welcome the truth that finally has room to surface.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio fills your seventh house of partnership, and the waxing gibbous phase asks you to look closely at what a relationship is actually becoming. The Sun's move into Leo lights your fourth house of home and inner foundation just as Mercury turns direct, easing the miscommunications that may have clouded a domestic or family matter recently. What felt tangled starts to make sense again.
taureau.love: A partner's intensity today is not a threat but an invitation to go deeper than surface pleasantries. With Mercury direct, a conversation about commitment or expectations can finally reach real clarity instead of circling the same confusion.
taureau.work: Negotiations and partnerships benefit enormously from Mercury's direct motion; a contract or agreement that stalled can now move toward completion. Say the plain thing rather than the diplomatic half-version.
taureau.energy: Your earth steadies the Scorpio Moon's undertow, giving you the patience to sit with intensity rather than flee it. Ground yourself through touch, food, or time in nature before any important exchange.
taureau.intuition: Your intuition about a partner's unspoken needs is unusually precise today. Notice what is said only through tone and timing, not the words themselves.
taureau.mantra: I meet depth with steadiness, not avoidance.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio moves through your sixth house of daily rhythm and wellbeing, building toward fullness at 69 percent illumination. Mercury, your own ruling planet, turns direct today, and the relief is tangible: plans, messages, and decisions that felt frustratingly stuck finally begin to move in a straight line again. The Sun's shift into Leo brightens your third house of communication and thought, adding ease to a day that has been a long time coming.
gemeaux.love: With Mercury direct again, a conversation that kept going in circles can finally reach an actual conclusion. Say what you mean plainly today; the Scorpio Moon rewards honesty over your usual cleverness.
gemeaux.work: This is the day to send the email you have been drafting for weeks, confirm the plan you kept second-guessing, or revisit a project that stalled during the retrograde. Momentum returns quickly once you take the first concrete step.
gemeaux.energy: A quiet, focused intensity replaces your usual scattered energy today, well suited to finishing rather than starting. Use it to close a loop that has been open too long.
gemeaux.intuition: Your mind, freshly unclouded, can now distinguish between a genuine hunch and simple anxious repetition. Trust the insight that arrives quietly rather than the one that arrives loudly.
gemeaux.mantra: I speak plainly now that my mind is clear again.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun leaves your sign today and enters Leo, closing a season that asked you to tend to your own emotional foundations before anything else. The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio fills your fifth house with waxing gibbous intensity, drawing out feeling through creativity and play rather than withdrawal. Mercury, which has been retrograding back through your own sign, turns direct today as well, releasing a tension you may not have fully named: the sense of being unable to say what you meant. Both shifts together mark a genuine turning point.
cancer.love: As Mercury turns direct, a misunderstanding that lingered during its retrograde finally has room to resolve. The Scorpio Moon in your fifth house adds emotional depth to romance today, favoring honest declarations over careful ambiguity.
cancer.work: The Sun's move into Leo shifts attention from your inner world toward how you are seen and expressed publicly. A creative project delayed by Mercury's retrograde can now proceed with newfound clarity.
cancer.energy: There is a genuine lightness available today as the season changes and communication unclogs. Let yourself feel the relief physically, not just intellectually, through movement or play.
cancer.intuition: Trust what your feelings have been quietly rehearsing all through Mercury's retrograde; those instincts are now ready to be spoken aloud with confidence.
cancer.mantra: I release the tension of not being understood.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: Today the Sun enters your own sign, and your solar return begins: Leo season is here, and something in you that has waited quietly all year finally steps forward into the light. The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio in your fourth house adds emotional depth to this new beginning, asking your renewal to include your private, inner world and not only your public radiance. With Mercury now direct, any delay or miscommunication that shadowed your run-up to this birthday season dissolves, letting you enter this new solar year with a clear mind.
lion.love: The start of your season brings a natural magnetism, and with Mercury direct, whatever confusion clouded a relationship recently has room to clear. Speak from genuine warmth rather than performance today.
lion.work: This is an excellent day to set intentions for the year ahead professionally, now that Mercury's retrograde fog has lifted. A plan delayed by miscommunication can move forward with real confidence.
lion.energy: Your fire returns to its natural home today, radiant but tempered by the Scorpio Moon's emotional undertow. Let your vitality include your feelings, not just your performance of them.
lion.intuition: Trust the quiet, private sense of what this new year of your life is truly asking of you, beneath the visible excitement of the season's arrival.
lion.mantra: I begin this new year of my life with clarity and warmth.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio moves through your third house of thought and exchange, building toward fullness as the waxing gibbous phase intensifies. Mercury, your ruling planet, turns direct today, and the relief runs deep: the mental fog, the miscommunications, the second-guessing of the past weeks finally begin to lift. The Sun's move into Leo brightens your twelfth house of rest and reflection, encouraging you to metabolize this new clarity quietly before broadcasting it.
vierge.love: With Mercury direct again, you can finally trust your own read on a relationship rather than doubting it in circles. A conversation postponed during the retrograde now has real potential to land well.
vierge.work: Mercury turning direct in your own zone of communication is significant: send the message, sign the document, clarify the plan that has felt maddeningly uncertain. Momentum returns almost immediately.
vierge.energy: Your earth steadies the Scorpio Moon's depth, and the mental relief of Mercury direct frees up energy you did not realize you were spending on confusion. Use it, but rest before you spend it all.
vierge.intuition: Your analytical mind and your intuition finally align again today rather than working against each other. Trust the conclusion you arrive at once the noise settles.
vierge.mantra: My mind is clear, and I trust what it tells me.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio deepens your second house of resources and self-worth, its waxing gibbous light drawing attention toward what truly sustains you. The Sun's shift into Leo lights your eleventh house of community and shared vision, while Mercury turning direct today eases any recent confusion around money, value, or a delayed agreement. Together these shifts favor a day of grounded reassessment rather than more analysis.
balance.love: A conversation about security or shared resources, stalled during Mercury's retrograde, can now move toward genuine resolution. Speak honestly about what you need rather than what seems reasonable to ask for.
balance.work: Financial clarity returns as Mercury goes direct; a delayed payment, contract, or valuation conversation should unstick soon. Trust the number or the boundary you land on today.
balance.energy: The Scorpio Moon asks you to sit with what truly has value to you, beneath the appealing surface Venus usually favors. A short, focused reassessment serves you better than constant comparison today.
balance.intuition: Your sense of your own worth is unusually accurate right now, freed from the doubt that clouded recent weeks. Trust the number, the boundary, or the value you land on.
balance.mantra: I know my worth and no longer question it.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon returns to your own sign today at 23 degrees, its waxing gibbous light at 69 percent building toward a fullness that feels distinctly personal. The Sun's move into Leo illuminates your tenth house of vocation and reputation, and Mercury turning direct releases any recent tension around how you have been perceived or misunderstood professionally. This is a day when your natural intensity is an asset rather than something to soften.
scorpion.love: With the Moon in your own sign and Mercury now direct, you can finally say the thing you have been circling for weeks. Trust your depth today rather than editing it down for someone else's comfort.
scorpion.work: Mercury direct clears up a professional miscommunication or delay, and the Sun's arrival in your career house adds visibility to your recent efforts. Step forward rather than staying in the background as you often prefer.
scorpion.energy: Your ruling Pluto and this Scorpio Moon combine to give you unusual magnetism today. Use it deliberately rather than letting it simmer unspoken.
scorpion.intuition: This is one of your most intuitively powerful days of the month; the Moon at home sharpens everything you already sense about people and situations. Act on it with confidence.
scorpion.mantra: My intensity is a gift, and I use it without apology.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio moves quietly through your twelfth house, its waxing gibbous glow inviting reflection rather than the outward expansion you usually crave. The Sun's shift into Leo lights your ninth house of belief and adventure, restoring your natural optimism just as Mercury turns direct, releasing whatever travel plan, publication, or long-view decision has felt stuck in limbo. Let the relief register before you leap back into motion.
sagittaire.love: A quiet, private feeling about a relationship becomes easier to name honestly now that Mercury's fog has lifted. Give yourself a moment of solitude before deciding how to voice it.
sagittaire.work: A delayed trip, course, or publishing plan can now move forward as Mercury goes direct and the Sun energizes your ninth house of larger vision. Trust the renewed sense of direction.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire is present but turned inward today, better suited to reflection than performance. Honor the quieter pace before Leo season pulls you back outward.
sagittaire.intuition: The twelfth house Moon deepens your access to subconscious knowing; a recurring thought or image deserves your attention rather than dismissal.
sagittaire.mantra: I trust the quiet clarity arriving before the next leap.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio moves through your eleventh house of community and shared aspiration, its waxing gibbous light building toward a fuller sense of where you truly belong. The Sun's move into Leo brightens your eighth house of shared resources and deep transformation, and Mercury turning direct today eases any recent confusion in a group project, a financial matter, or a long-delayed agreement. Trust that things are finally moving again.
capricorne.love: A friend or partner's honest perspective lands more easily today now that the mental fog has cleared. Let yourself be genuinely influenced rather than only polite.
capricorne.work: Mercury direct is especially significant for shared financial matters or team-based work; a contract, split, or collaborative decision that has been stuck can now proceed. State your position plainly.
capricorne.energy: Your earth grounds the Scorpio Moon's undertow, giving you the patience to work through a collective matter carefully rather than rushing the resolution.
capricorne.intuition: Your read on a group dynamic or a shared financial arrangement is notably accurate today. Trust the pattern you have been sensing beneath the surface.
capricorne.mantra: I trust what finally becomes clear among the people I share with.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio deepens your tenth house of vocation and public direction, its waxing gibbous light drawing focus to how your efforts are being seen. The Sun's shift into Leo lights your seventh house of partnership, and Mercury turning direct today releases tension around a professional plan or reputation matter that felt stuck in ambiguity. Pluto retrograde continues its slow work in your own sign, but today's other shifts bring welcome forward motion.
verseau.love: The Sun's arrival in your partnership house brings warmth to a relationship just as Mercury goes direct, clearing up a recent misunderstanding. Say plainly what you want from this connection rather than circling it.
verseau.work: A career matter delayed by Mercury's retrograde, a decision about direction or reputation, can now move forward with real clarity. Trust the plan that finally makes sense again.
verseau.energy: Your air element meets the Scorpio Moon's intensity and produces unusual focus today, useful for finishing rather than starting. Direct it toward the one thing that matters most publicly.
verseau.intuition: Your sense of how you are truly perceived professionally is sharper and more trustworthy today than it has been in weeks. Act on the clarity rather than doubting it again.
verseau.mantra: I trust the direction that has finally become clear.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Scorpio fills your ninth house of meaning and belief, its waxing gibbous light expanding your sense of purpose beyond the everyday. The Sun's move into Leo brightens your sixth house of daily service and wellbeing, and Mercury turning direct today releases any recent confusion about a plan, a piece of writing, or a belief you were unable to fully articulate. Neptune, your ruling planet, remains retrograde in Aries, but today's other shifts bring real, tangible relief.
poissons.love: A conversation about what you truly believe a relationship should be can now be spoken with more clarity, now that Mercury's fog has lifted. Trust the words that finally come easily.
poissons.work: A daily routine or health-related plan benefits from the Sun's arrival in your sixth house, and Mercury going direct clears up a work misunderstanding that has lingered too long. Move forward on the plan you can now see clearly.
poissons.energy: Your water element rises with the Scorpio Moon's depth, but the Sun's move into your service house asks you to channel that feeling into practical daily care rather than only inward reflection.
poissons.intuition: Your sense of larger meaning and direction is unusually vivid today, no longer clouded by the mental fog of recent weeks. Trust the belief that has quietly solidified.
poissons.mantra: I trust the meaning that has finally become clear to me.
poissons.author: Sibylle
